'''âz-v-zh-n''' ('''kazavzhenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fimble|fimble]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-v-zh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fimble|fimble]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-v-zh-n
|-
! Lemma
| kazavzhenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizavzhenoko|thizavzhenoko]] || [[word:jizavzhenoko|jizavzhenoko]] || [[word:shizavzhenoko|shizavzhenoko]] || [[word:kizavzhenoko|kizavzhenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzavzhenoko|thuthuzavzhenoko]] || [[word:jujuzavzhenoko|jujuzavzhenoko]] || [[word:shushuzavzhenoko|shushuzavzhenoko]] || [[word:kukuzavzhenoko|kukuzavzhenoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
